tasks.label: Arduino: Upload (Mega COM6)
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference = 'Continue'; Write-Host 'Upload attempt 1/2'; arduino-cli upload -p COM6 --fqbn arduino:avr:mega .; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { Write-Host 'Upload attempt 2/2'; arduino-cli upload -p COM6 --fqbn arduino:avr:mega .; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE } }
